company.name: Labwise Trading CC
company.tagline: Your Partner in Laboratory & Educational Equipment

products.name: Syringes
products.description: Disposable plastic syringes for laboratory dispensing and measurement. Suitable for school biology and chemistry practicals.

products.name: Dropper pipette (plastic)
products.description: Flexible plastic dropper pipette ideal for precise liquid transfer in classroom experiments. Disposable, hygienic, easy to use.

products.name: Beaker (100 ml borosilicate)
products.description: Heat-resistant borosilicate glass beaker for general chemistry use. Graduated for approximate volume measurement.

products.name: Beaker (50 ml glass)
products.description: Small 50 ml glass beaker for low-volume reactions, measurements and dispensing.

products.name: Beaker (250 ml)
products.description: Standard 250 ml glass beaker for routine laboratory mixing, heating and measuring.

products.name: Blunt forceps
products.description: Stainless steel blunt-tip forceps for safe specimen handling in biology dissections. Corrosion resistant, autoclavable.
products.spec: Stainless steel, 125 mm long, blunt point

products.name: Scalpel handle (No.3)
products.description: Stainless steel surgical scalpel handle No.3 — compatible with No.10–15 scalpel blades. For dissection in biology labs.

products.name: Scalpel blade (No.3)
products.description: Sharp stainless steel scalpel blade No.3, fits standard scalpel handles. Disposable, sterile.

products.name: Glass rod (stirring)
products.description: Plain glass stirring rod for chemistry experiments. Smooth ends, chemically inert.

products.name: Stopwatch (Sanji 1100)
products.description: Sanji 1100 sport stopwatch with 0.1-second precision. Suitable for biology and physics timing experiments.
products.spec: Sanji 1100 Stopwatch, reading to 0.1 s or better

products.name: Safety goggles
products.description: Standard safety goggles for full eye protection against splashes and fumes. CE-certified for school laboratory use.

products.name: Test tube (heat-resistant, 24×150 mm)
products.description: Borosilicate heat-resistant test tube, 24 mm × 150 mm. Suitable for heating reactions over Bunsen burners.

products.name: Test tube (standard)
products.description: Standard glass test tube for routine school chemistry reactions and observations.

products.name: Hard-glass test tube
products.description: Thick-walled hard-glass test tube, heat-resistant for prolonged Bunsen burner exposure.

products.name: Boiling tube
products.description: Large heat-resistant boiling tube, ideal for vigorous reactions, distillation and prolonged heating.

products.name: Test tube brush
products.description: Standard test tube cleaning brush with soft bristles and twisted wire handle. For glassware washing.

products.name: Test tube rack (wooden, 7-hole)
products.description: Wooden test tube rack holding 7 test tubes. Stable, lightweight, easy to clean.

products.name: Portable Bunsen burner (LPG)
products.description: Portable LPG Bunsen burner with metallic casing and refillable gas cartridge. Includes safety clamps. Ideal for classroom heating experiments.
products.spec: Metallic casing, with refill gas canister/cartridge and metal clamps for fastening

products.name: Tripod stand (steel, 205 mm)
products.description: Standard steel tripod stand for supporting beakers and flasks over a Bunsen burner. Powder-coated finish.
products.spec: Standard steel tripod stand, 205 mm height

products.name: Gas cartridge (Bunsen refill)
products.description: Replacement LPG gas cartridge for portable Bunsen burners. Standard fitting.

products.name: Gauze wire with ceramic centre
products.description: Wire gauze mat with ceramic centre, 150 mm × 150 mm. Distributes heat evenly under glassware on a tripod.

products.name: Thermometer (mercury 0–100 °C)
products.description: Mercury-in-glass thermometer with red alcohol or mercury fill, range 0 °C to 100 °C. For routine temperature measurement.

products.name: Pre-prepared microscope slide (dicot root)
products.description: Pre-prepared microscope slide showing transverse section of a dicotyledonous root. Permanently mounted, ready to view.
products.spec: Transverse section of a dicotyledonous root

products.name: Light microscope (monocular LED)
products.description: Standard monocular cordless LED microscope with ×10/×40 objectives, mechanical stage and rechargeable battery. Suitable for senior secondary biology.
products.spec: Standard monocular cordless LED, with rechargeable batteries, eyepiece lens ×10, low-power objective ×10, high-power objective ×40, 240V charger and mechanical stage

products.name: Hydrochloric acid 1.0 mol/dm³
products.description: Standardised hydrochloric acid (HCl) solution at 1.0 mol/dm³ concentration. Laboratory-grade for titrations and reactions.

products.name: Hydrochloric acid 2.0 mol/dm³
products.description: Standardised hydrochloric acid (HCl) solution at 2.0 mol/dm³. Suitable for advanced reactions and titrations.

products.name: Sodium hydroxide 0.1 mol/dm³
products.description: Standardised sodium hydroxide (NaOH) solution at 0.100 mol/dm³. For titrations against weak/strong acids.

products.name: Sodium hydroxide 1.0 mol/dm³
products.description: Sodium hydroxide (NaOH) aqueous solution at 1.0 mol/dm³. Caustic — handle with appropriate PPE.

products.name: Nitric acid 2.0 mol/dm³
products.description: Nitric acid (HNO₃) solution at 2.0 mol/dm³ concentration. Strong oxidising acid for chemistry experiments.

products.name: Ammonia 2.0 mol/dm³
products.description: Aqueous ammonia (NH₃) solution at 2.0 mol/dm³. Pungent — use in fume hood. For complex-ion experiments.

products.name: Barium nitrate 0.100 mol/dm³
products.description: Barium nitrate (Ba(NO₃)₂) aqueous solution at 0.100 mol/dm³. For sulfate ion detection tests.

products.name: Lime water (saturated)
products.description: Saturated aqueous calcium hydroxide (Ca(OH)₂). Used to test for carbon dioxide (turns milky).

products.name: Silver nitrate 0.05 mol/dm³
products.description: Silver nitrate (AgNO₃) aqueous solution at 0.05 mol/dm³. For halide ion detection tests. Light-sensitive.

products.name: Phenolphthalein indicator
products.description: Phenolphthalein indicator solution — pink in alkali, colourless in acid. Common acid-base titration indicator.

products.name: Bromothymol blue indicator
products.description: Bromothymol blue indicator solution — yellow at pH < 6, blue at pH > 7.6. For pH visualisation experiments.

products.name: Calcium carbonate
products.description: Pure calcium carbonate (CaCO₃) — solid chips and powder. For reaction-rate and stoichiometry experiments.

products.name: Aluminium sulfate (hydrated)
products.description: Hydrated aluminium sulfate Al₂(SO₄)₃·xH₂O. Used in flocculation and ion-precipitation experiments.

products.name: Sodium carbonate (anhydrous)
products.description: Anhydrous sodium carbonate (Na₂CO₃, soda ash). Primary standard for acid titrations.

products.name: Soft gelatine (25 g dessert sheets)
products.description: Food-grade dessert gelatine sheets/leaves, 25 g packs. Used in osmosis and diffusion experiments.

products.name: Distilled water
products.description: Standard laboratory-grade distilled water. For dilutions, solutions and rinsing glassware.

products.name: Red litmus paper (booklet)
products.description: Red litmus paper booklet (100+ leaves). Turns blue in alkaline solutions.
products.spec: Standard booklets of at least 100 leaves

products.name: Blue litmus paper (booklet)
products.description: Blue litmus paper booklet (100+ leaves). Turns red in acidic solutions.
products.spec: Standard booklets of at least 100 leaves

products.name: Universal indicator paper (booklet)
products.description: Universal indicator paper booklet (100+ leaves). Full-range pH 1-14 colour scale included.
products.spec: Standard booklets of at least 100 leaves

products.name: Filter paper (pack of 100)
products.description: Standard laboratory filter paper, 100 papers per pack. For gravimetric filtration and qualitative separations.

products.name: Wooden splint
products.description: Standard wooden splints for hydrogen and carbon dioxide testing (pop test, glowing splint).

products.name: Glass pipette (25 cm³ graduated)
products.description: Glass graduated pipette, 25 cm³. For precise volume transfer in titrations and dilutions.

products.name: Pipette filler (rubber 3-valve)
products.description: Standard 3-valve rubber pipette filler bulb. Safe alternative to mouth pipetting.

products.name: Burette (50 cm³)
products.description: 50 cm³ glass burette with stopcock for precise titrant delivery. Class A graduations.

products.name: Retort stand (chemistry)
products.description: Retort stand with heavy cast iron base — does not require G-clamping. Stable for titrations and apparatus support.
products.spec: With heavy cast iron base (does not need G clamping)

products.name: Burette clamp (2-burette metallic)
products.description: Metallic burette clamp that accommodates two burettes simultaneously. Cork-lined grips protect glassware.

products.name: Funnel (plastic)
products.description: Standard plastic laboratory funnel for liquid transfer and filtration. Chemically resistant.

products.name: Volumetric flask with stopper (250 cm³)
products.description: Class A 250 cm³ volumetric flask with ground-glass stopper. For accurate solution preparation.
products.spec: 250 cm³ capacity volumetric flask with stopper

products.name: Conical flask (250 cm³ graduated)
products.description: Graduated 250 cm³ Erlenmeyer (conical) flask. Wide base, narrow neck for swirling without spillage.

products.name: Measuring cylinder (50 cm³)
products.description: Glass measuring cylinder, 50 cm³ capacity. Suitable for routine volume measurement in school labs.

products.name: Stop clock (with second display)
products.description: Mechanical or digital stop clock with second display. For reaction-rate experiments.

products.name: Electronic balance (0.01 g, 200 g max)
products.description: Electronic precision balance — 0.01 g accuracy, 200 g maximum capacity. Tare function, calibration weight included.
products.spec: Electronic balance, minimum accuracy 0.01 g, maximum 200 g

products.name: Wash bottle (500 ml)
products.description: 500 ml polyethylene wash bottle for distilled water dispensing. Bent delivery tube, screw cap.

products.name: Spatula (stainless steel)
products.description: Standard chemistry spatula — double-ended, stainless steel. For solid sample handling.

products.name: Dropper pipette (lab grade)
products.description: Standard plastic dropper pipette for chemistry labs. Disposable, accurate drop-by-drop dispensing.

products.name: Test tube holder (wooden handle)
products.description: Test tube holder with spring-loaded jaws and wooden handle. For holding hot test tubes safely.
products.spec: Test tube holder with wooden handle

products.name: Heat-proof mat (lab bench)
products.description: Standard heat-proof bench mat. Protects lab benches from hot glassware and naked flames.

products.name: Chemical containers (200 ml)
products.description: Reusable chemical storage bottles, 200 ml capacity. Screw cap, chemically inert.
products.spec: Able to accommodate 200 ml of solutions

products.name: Petri dish (80 mm plastic)
products.description: Plastic Petri dish, 80 mm diameter × 14 mm height. For specimen viewing and culture work.
products.spec: Plastic, approximately 14 mm height × 80 mm diameter

products.name: Petri dish (65 mm plastic)
products.description: Small plastic Petri dish, 65 mm diameter × 14 mm height. For micro-scale observation.
products.spec: Plastic, approximately 14 mm height × 65 mm diameter

products.name: Retort stand (physics, 60 cm)
products.description: Tall 60 cm retort stand with heavy cast iron base. Suitable for physics experiments involving springs, pendulums and tall apparatus.
products.spec: With heavy cast iron base (does not need G clamping), 60 cm height

products.name: Clamp (standard physics)
products.description: Standard universal laboratory clamp. Fits retort stand rods. Adjustable jaw width.

products.name: Boss head (metallic)
products.description: Metallic boss head connector — attaches clamps to retort stand rods at 90° or angled.

products.name: Newton meter (spring scale)
products.description: Standard Newton meter (spring scale) for force measurement. Typical range 0-10 N or 0-20 N.

products.name: Triangular prism (optics)
products.description: Triangular prism for light refraction and spectrum experiments. Available in glass or hard acrylic.
products.spec: Made out of hard material e.g. wood, glass

products.name: Slotted mass (50 g)
products.description: Calibrated 50 g slotted mass for mechanics experiments. Stackable on slotted mass hanger.

products.name: Metre ruler stick (wooden)
products.description: 1-metre wooden ruler calibrated in mm and cm. For length measurement in physics experiments.
products.spec: Wooden 1 m ruler, calibrated in mm and cm

products.name: Vernier calliper (0.1 mm)
products.description: Metal Vernier calliper with 0.1 mm reading precision (or better). Measures internal, external and depth dimensions.

products.name: White vinegar (5% food-grade)
products.description: Food-grade 5% spirit vinegar, supplied in 5L jugs. For school chemistry acid experiments and cleaning.

products.name: Aluminium foil (household roll)
products.description: Standard household aluminium foil roll for general lab use, sample wrapping and insulation.

products.name: Nitrile gloves Medium (box of 100)
products.description: Powder-free, latex-free nitrile examination gloves, size Medium. Box of 100. For chemistry and biology PPE.

products.name: Nitrile gloves Large (box of 100)
products.description: Powder-free, latex-free nitrile examination gloves, size Large. Box of 100. For chemistry and biology PPE.

products.name: Cotton wool balls (absorbent)
products.description: Absorbent cotton wool balls — multi-purpose for cleaning, sterilisation prep and biology experiments.

products.name: Kitchen paper towel roll
products.description: 2-ply kitchen paper towel roll, minimum 50 sheets per roll. For lab bench cleaning and spill absorption.

products.name: Paper plates 18 cm
products.description: Disposable paper plates, 18 cm diameter. For specimen display in biology and home-economics labs.

products.name: Paper plates 23 cm
products.description: Disposable paper plates, 23 cm diameter. Larger size for specimen display and food-science demonstrations.

products.name: Digital and Linear IC Tester
products.description: Combined digital and linear IC tester for TVET and university electronics labs. Tests 74-series, CMOS, op-amps, comparators, ADC/DAC and voltage regulators.
products.spec: Microprocessor-based, 40-pin ZIF socket for digital ICs, 20-pin ZIF for linear/analog. 16×2 backlit LCD, auto-search. AC 220V, 50Hz.

products.name: Soldering & Desoldering Station (hot air rework)
products.description: 2-in-1 SMD rework station: hot-air gun + temperature-controlled soldering iron. ESD safe. For PCB assembly and rework.
products.spec: Quick 957D+ or Atten ST-862D 2-in-1 SMD rework station: hot-air gun (100–450 °C, 24 L/min) + temperature-controlled soldering iron (200–480 °C). Digital LCD, sleep mode, 700W total.

products.name: Spectrum Analyser (9 kHz – 1.5 GHz)
products.description: RF spectrum analyser with tracking generator. For telecoms training, RF measurement and antenna characterisation.
products.spec: Rigol DSA815-TG (9 kHz – 1.5 GHz) with tracking generator, RBW 100 Hz – 1 MHz, DANL −135 dBm typical, 10.4″ colour display. 3-year warranty.

products.name: PCB Making Machine (CNC prototyping)
products.description: Educational CNC PCB prototyping machine. Drilling, routing and isolation milling on FR4 blanks. Includes design software.
products.spec: Work area 200 × 300 mm, 60,000 rpm spindle, ±0.05 mm accuracy. Includes CAM software, starter bit set, FR4 blanks, manual.

products.name: Digital Oscilloscope (200 MHz, 2-channel)
products.description: Educational standard 200 MHz digital storage oscilloscope. 7″ TFT, 24 Mpts memory, FFT, serial decode (UART, I²C, SPI).
products.spec: Rigol DS1202Z-E or Siglent SDS1202X-E — 200 MHz, 2 channels, 1 GSa/s, 24 Mpts, 7″ TFT, USB/LAN/HDMI.

products.name: Bench Digital Multimeter (5.5-digit, hFE)
products.description: 5.5-digit bench multimeter with hFE transistor test, temperature (PT100), USB and LAN. Industrial-grade laboratory standard.
products.spec: Siglent SDM3055 or Rigol DM3058E — 5.5-digit, dual display, true RMS, V to 750V AC/DC, I to 10A, R to 100MΩ, C, freq, diode, continuity, hFE, PT100.

products.name: Signal Generator (200 MHz, 2-channel)
products.description: Dual-channel arbitrary/function waveform generator. Full modulation suite for telecoms and electronics teaching.
products.spec: Rigol DG992 Pro or Siglent SDG6022X — 200 MHz, 2 channels, 16-bit, sine/square/pulse/triangle/arbitrary; AM/FM/PM/PWM/FSK/ASK/PSK. USB/LAN, 7″ touchscreen.

products.name: DC Power Supply (Triple Output, Programmable)
products.description: Triple-output programmable DC bench supply. 2 × variable channels + 1 fixed. Series/parallel modes, USB/LAN.
products.spec: Siglent SPD3303X-E — 2 × 0–32V/3.2A + 1 × 2.5V/3.3V/5V fixed. 0.1mV/0.1mA resolution, 4.3″ TFT, USB/LAN, OVP/OCP, CAT II.

products.name: AC Variable Power Supply (Variac)
products.description: Variable AC autotransformer (variac) — 0–260V AC output, 2 kVA. For motor testing and AC experiments.
products.spec: 220V AC input, 0–260V AC variable, 2 kVA / 8A. Analogue voltmeter, smooth rotation, brass commutator, fused output, metal enclosure, CE certified.

products.name: Antenna Training Kit
products.description: Comprehensive antenna trainer — 22 different antenna types with PC-based radiation pattern plotting. For RF/communications training.
products.spec: Tesca/Naugra Advanced Antenna Trainer System — 2 tripods, 22 antennas (dipole, monopole, Yagi, helical, microstrip, horn, log-periodic, etc.), RF TX/RX, plotting software, cables, PC interface, manual.

products.name: Optical Fibre Communication Trainer
products.description: Fibre optic communication trainer — analog and digital signal transmission, single-mode and multi-mode fibre included.
products.spec: Tesca/Naugra — analog and digital transmission, LED & laser TX, photodiode RX, single-mode & multi-mode fibre spools, BNC patches, experiment manual.

products.name: Mobile Communication Trainer
products.description: GSM/CDMA/3G/4G concepts trainer with modulation experiments. 20+ ready-made experiments.
products.spec: Tesca — RF modules, modulation (FSK, PSK, QPSK), TDMA/CDMA experiments, channel coding, oscilloscope outputs, PC software.

products.name: Satellite Communication Trainer
products.description: Satellite comms trainer — uplink/downlink at 2.4 GHz, BER measurement, modulation experiments.
products.spec: Tesca — uplink/downlink at 2.4 GHz, TX/RX modules, satellite link simulator, BPSK/QPSK, error correction, BER measurement, mini parabolic dish, RF amplifiers, PC interface.

products.name: Cathode Ray Oscilloscope (Analog, 20 MHz)
products.description: Analog 20 MHz dual-trace CRO with 6″ CRT — for teaching analogue oscilloscope fundamentals.
products.spec: 20 MHz dual-trace — 6″ CRT, 2 channels, 5 mV/div – 5 V/div, dual time base, X-Y mode, hold-off. Includes 2 × 1:1/10:1 probes. AC 220V.

products.name: Bertin AlphaE Radon Monitor
products.description: Bertin AlphaE Ultra-Small Radon Monitor — measurement range 20 Bq/m³ to 10 MBq/m³. Compact pocket-size, USB rechargeable, 6-month battery. For occupational radon monitoring.
products.spec: Range 20 Bq/m³ to 10 MBq/m³, simultaneous T/H/P recording, 6-month battery, USB rechargeable, 111×78×36 mm, 213 g. Includes user manual, calibration certificate, 12-month warranty.
